commonAnnotations.summary: Pod payments-api-7f9dd8b6c4-liv1k has restarted 6 times in 12 minutes.
commonAnnotations.description: One replica of payments-api keeps restarting, while the other two are Running and Ready. Application logs show normal request processing right up to each termination.
commonAnnotations.error: Container exit codes are 0 (clean shutdown), not crash-style — yet kubelet keeps restarting the pod.
commonAnnotations.suspected_symptom: Repeated restarts without OOM, crash, or image pull errors.
